title: Fantasia Recharged
body:
# **Fantasia Recharged** 
*Epic RPG Modpack for Minecraft*

## 🌟 **Includes**

### 🔮 **Magic & Adventure**
- **Magic Schools**: Hex Casting, Botania, Spellcasting
- **Epic Battles**: Smart mobs, bosses, dynamic combat
- **Legendary Weapons**: From dragonsteel to artifacts

### 🌍 **Living World**
- **Secret Biomes**: Eden Ring, dungeons, ruins
- **Deep Progression**: Skills, talents, professions
- **Companions**: Faithful travel partners

### 🎯 **Key Mods**
```
Botania • Hex Casting • Ice and Fire
MCDW Weapons • Simply Swords • RPG Difficulty  
Eden Ring • Better Combat • LevelZ • Trinkets
```

## 🏰 **Official Server**
**Join our friendly community!**
- 🎮 **Active server** with always updated pack
- 👥 **Friendly community** - help for newcomers and group dungeon runs
- 🏆 **Events & tournaments** - regular competitions and adventures
- 📱 **Discord community** - chat, support, announcements

### 💫 **Features**
- ✅ **Balanced difficulty**
- ✅ **Beautiful visuals**
- ✅ **Thoughtful progression**
- ✅ **Atmospheric gameplay**
- ✅ **Active community**

**Create your legend in a world where magic comes alive! Join our server today!** ✨
